category_sources: source_facts.description says "Command-line tool for porting Excalidraw diagrams to Gliffy"; official repository https://github.com/sindrel/excalidraw-converter describes porting Excalidraw diagrams to Gliffy, draw.io, and Mermaid.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is excalidraw-converter; official repository https://github.com/sindrel/excalidraw-converter uses the same project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README at https://github.com/sindrel/excalidraw-converter is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/sindrel/excalidraw-converter, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Excalidraw-to-Gliffy conversion; official repository https://github.com/sindrel/excalidraw-converter also names draw.io and Mermaid support; source_facts.executables lists command-line binaries.
